description: Graph-based RAG: entity relations, multi-hop queries, semantic search tren corpus lon. Ket noi brain/knowledge/ vao graph retrieval (OPEN-004). Dung Ollama local, khong can API ben ngoai.

conflict_check.open-notebook: SAFE — open-notebook = UI layer, LightRAG = backend RAG engine. Complementary.
conflict_check.mem0: SAFE — mem0 = agent memory, LightRAG = document graph. Different scopes.
conflict_check.MaxKB: SAFE — MaxKB = multi-user enterprise UI, LightRAG = graph backend.
conflict_check.firecrawl: SAFE — firecrawl feeds data INTO LightRAG (Firecrawl->LightRAG pipeline).

pipeline.open004_poc: LightRAG connects brain/knowledge/ to graph retrieval as per OPEN-004

notes: Phase 3 DONE 2026-03-23. OPEN-004 IN_PROGRESS. Dung Ollama local (gemma2:2b + nomic-embed-text), khong can API key. Noop mode khi chua cai lightrag-hku.
